title: Reporting: Providing weekly updates on campaign performance, includi
content:
Reporting: Providing weekly updates on campaign performance, including key metrics such as lead generation rates, cost per lead, and overall ROI.

8. Legal and Compliance Considerations


Adherence to all relevant advertising standards and legal requirements, ensuring the campaign complies with the policies of Meta platforms. A Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) will protect the confidentiality of shared information and campaign strategies if required.

9. Acceptance Criteria


Success will be measured by the campaign’s ability to generate high-quality leads for the Client's merchant cash advance services, with specific performance metrics established early in the campaign.

10. Signatures


This SOW becomes valid upon the signatures of both parties, marking the commencement of a focused effort to enhance lead generation for Merchant Industries Access through strategic advertising on Meta platforms.

Client: ___________________________________ Date: _______________
context: From document: Statement of Work (SOW) for Marketing Services for Merchant Industries… — chunk 5 (chunk 5/6)
